title: Embrace Mobile Monitoring SDK Configuration File v1.0.0
description: Schema for the JSON Schema for the Embrace mobile monitoring SDK configuration file.

report_disk_usage.description: Enable disk usage collection. Default is true.

enabled.description: Connect to uncaught exception handler. Default is true.

capture_request_content_length.description: Default is true. Enable or disable capturing request content length.

items.description: List of regex patterns to exclude from capture. Use empty list to disable.

disabled_url_patterns.description: List of regex patterns to exclude from capture. Use empty list to disable.

enable_native_monitoring.description: Enable native crash capture. Default is true.

trace_id_header.description: Header name used for trace ids. Default is "X-Correlation-ID".

async_end.description: Enable or disable asynchronous session termination. Default is false.

max_session_seconds.description: Enable or disable automatic session termination. Must be at least 60 seconds.

automatically_end.description: Enable or disable automatic end of startup moment. Default is true.

take_screenshot.description: Take screenshot on startup moment. Default is false.

capture_coordinates.description: Capture tap coordinates. Default is true.

capture_query_params.description: Do not capture query params. Default is true.

enable.description: Enable web view data capture. Default is true.
